CustomField.description: Total number of calls, emails, and text touchpoints between the SaaS Onboarding Specialist, Billing Onboarding Specialist, and Onboarding Coordinator.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total number of calls, emails, and text touchpoints between the SaaS Onboarding Specialist, Billing Onboarding Specialist, and Onboarding Coordinator.
CustomField.label: Total Number of Onboarding Touchpoints
